zh.lifeSummary: 當Sir William Atherton III於1382年出生在英國藍卡爾維根時，他的父親Sir William de Atherton II26歲，母親Agnes de Vernon12歲。他於1399年與Elizabeth Pilkington在英國藍卡爾布拉可洛德結婚。他們至少是1個兒子和2個女兒的父母。他去世於1435年在英國藍卡爾阿瑟頓享年53歲。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Sir William Atherton III于1382年出生在英国藍卡爾維根时，他的父亲Sir William de Atherton II26岁，母亲Agnes de Vernon12岁。他于1399年与Elizabeth Pilkington在英国藍卡爾布拉可洛德结婚。他们至少是1个儿子和2个女儿的父母。他去世于1435年在英国藍卡爾阿瑟頓享年53岁。

nameMeanings.name: Atherton
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English: habitational name from a place near Manchester named Atherton, from the Old English personal name Æthelhere + Old English tūn ‘settlement’.
English: habitational name from Hatherton, Staffordshire, from Old English haguthorn + dūn ‘the hill where hawthorn grows’.

English (East Anglia): topographic name from Middle English at ther doune ‘(dweller) on the hill’ (Old English æt thǣre dūne). Through confusion of -don and -ton, Attherdoune was altered to Atherton, Adderton, and Atterton.

nameMeanings.name: William
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Probably the most successful of all the Old French names of Germanic origin that were introduced to England by the Normans. It is derived from Germanic wil ‘will, desire’ + helm ‘helmet, protection’. The fact that it was borne by the Conqueror himself does not seem to have inhibited its favour with the ‘conquered’ population: in the first century after the Conquest it was the commonest male name of all, and not only among the Normans. In the later Middle Ages it was overtaken by John , but continued to run second to that name until the 20th century, when the picture became more fragmented.

historicEvents.title: Wycliffe's Bible
historicEvents.description: John Wycliffe, English theologian and professor at the University of Oxford, completed a translation of the Bible from the Latin Vulgate into Middle English. This translation is known as Wycliffe's Bible and was completed around 1382.

en.lifeSummary: When Sir William Atherton III was born in 1382, in Wigan, Lancashire, England, his father, Sir William de Atherton II, was 26 and his mother, Agnes de Vernon, was 12. He married Elizabeth Pilkington in 1399, in Blackrod, Lancashire, England. They were the parents of at least 1 son and 2 daughters. He died in 1435, in Atherton, Lancashire, England, at the age of 53.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Sir William Atherton III est né en 1382, à Wigan, Lancashire, Angleterre, son père, Sir William de Atherton II, avait 26 ans et sa mère, Agnes de Vernon, avait 12 ans. Il a épousé Elizabeth Pilkington en 1399, à Blackrod, Lancashire, Angleterre. Ils ont eu au moins 1 fils et 2 filles. Il est décédé en 1435, à Atherton, Lancashire, Angleterre, à l’âge de 53 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Als Sir William Atherton III 1382 in Wigan, Lancashire, England geboren wurde, war sein Vater Sir William de Atherton II 26 und seine Mutter Agnes de Vernon 12. Er hat 1399 in Blackrod, Lancashire, England Elizabeth Pilkington geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 1 Sohn und 2 Töchter. Er starb 1435 im Alter von 53 Jahren in Atherton, Lancashire, England.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Sir William Atherton III è nato il nel 1382 nel Wigan, Lancashire, England, il suo padre, Sir William de Atherton II, aveva 26 anni e il suo madre, Agnes de Vernon, aveva 12 anni. Lui sposato Elizabeth Pilkington nel 1399, nel Blackrod, Lancashire, England. Erano genitori di almeno 1 figlio e 2 figlie. Morì nel 1435, nel Atherton, Lancashire, England, all'età di 53 anni.

ja.lifeSummary: Sir William Atherton IIIが1382年にイギリスランカシュアイアウィガンで生まれた時，父Sir William de Atherton IIは26歳，母Agnes de Vernonは12歳であった。1399年にイギリスランカシュアイアブラクロドでElizabeth Pilkingtonと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも1人の息子と2人の娘の親であった。彼は1435年にイギリスランカシュアイアアスエルトンで53歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Sir William Atherton III(이)가 1382년 영국 랭카실르 위건에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Sir William de Atherton II(은)는 26세였고, 그의 어머니 Agnes de Vernon(은)는 12세였다. 그는 1399년 영국 랭카실르 블랙로드에서 Elizabeth Pilkington(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 한 명의 아들과 두 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1435년 영국 랭카실르 앳헤르턴에서 53세의 나이로 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Sir William Atherton III nasceu em 1382, em Wigan, Lancashire, Inglaterra, seu pai, Sir William de Atherton II, tinha 26 anos e sua mãe, Agnes de Vernon, tinha 12 anos. Ele casou-se com Elizabeth Pilkington em 1399, em Blackrod, Lancashire, Inglaterra. Eles tiveram pelo menos 1 filho e 2 filhas. Ele faleceu em 1435, em Atherton, Lancashire, Inglaterra, com 53 anos.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Sir William Atherton III родился в 1382 г. в местности виган, ланкашир, Англия, его отцу по имени Sir William de Atherton II было 26 лет, а матери, которую звали Agnes de Vernon, 12. Он женился на женщине по имени Elizabeth Pilkington в 1399 г. в местности блэккрод, ланкашир, Англия. У них был по крайней мере 1 сын и 2 дочери. Он умер в 1435 г. в местности атиртон, ланкашир, Англия в возрасте 53 лет.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Sir William Atherton III nació en 1382, en Wigan, Lancashire, Inglaterra, su papá, Sir William de Atherton II, tenía 26 años y su mamá, Agnes de Vernon, tenía 12 años. Se casó con Elizabeth Pilkington en 1399, en Blackrod, Lancashire, Inglaterra. Fueron padres de por lo menos 1 hijo y 2 hijas. Murió en 1435, en Atherton, Lancashire, Inglaterra, a la edad de 53 años.
